response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:03: Intro/Talk. 2. 00:03-02:51: 'Kimi ga Tame' (Music: Naoya Shimokawa, Lyrics: Naoko Sutani). Lyrics found on Uta-net. 3. 02:51-05:00: 'Fuantei na Kamisama' (Music: Naoya Shimokawa, Lyrics: Naoko Sutani). Lyrics found on Uta-net.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance featuring VTubers Hakui Koyori and a guest (who appears to be a real-life performer, possibly Suara or a guest covering these songs) performing two songs from the 'Utawarerumono' franchise: 'Kimi ga Tame' and 'Fuantei na Kamisama'.

scenes.description: VTubers and a guest performer sing the song 'Kimi ga Tame'. On-screen text indicates music by Naoya Shimokawa and lyrics by Naoko Sutani.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
きみの瞳に映る わたしは何色ですか
赤深き望むなら 渡そう陽の光を
悲しみが溢れ 瞼閉じました
こぼれた滴は 心に沁みゆく
行き渡る波は 弱く交えます
とどけしゆりかご 眠りをさそう夢に
なつかし 面影をさがす手を伸ばし
強く 抱きしめたくなる

ha-

きみの瞳に映る わたしは何色ですか
藍深き望むなら 渡そう高き空を
歓びが溢れ 巡りあいました
こぼれおつ笑みは 別れを隠す
人はいつしか朽ち果てるけれど
唄となり語り継がれてゆくでしょう

ha-

きみの瞳に映る わたしは何色ですか
緑(りょく)深き望むなら 渡そうこの大地を
もろく儚げなものよ
強く美しきものよ あるがまま

ha-

きみの瞳に映る わたしは何色ですか
安らぎを覚えたなら そこにわたしはいる
きみの瞳に映る わたしは何色ですか
うら深き望むなら 渡そうこの想いを
渡そう このすべてを
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The color of what is reflected in your eyes, what color is it?
If you wish for a deep red, I will bestow upon you the sunlight
Sorrow overflowed, and I closed my eyelids
The spilled drops sink into my heart
The spreading waves are weak, interacting
Passing on the cradle, inviting sleep, to a dream
Searching for nostalgic images, I reached out my hand and strongly wanted to embrace you

Ha-
The color of what is reflected in your eyes, what color is it?
If you wish for a deep indigo, I will bestow upon you the high sky
Joy overflowed, and we met by chance
The spilled smile hides the parting
People will eventually rot away, but it will become a song and be passed down, won't it?
Ha-

The color of what is reflected in your eyes, what color is it?
If you wish for a deep green, I will bestow upon you this earth
Fragile, fleeting things, strongly beautiful things, as they are

Ha-

The color of what is reflected in your eyes, what color is it?
If you remembered peace, I am there
The color of what is reflected in your eyes, what color is it?
If you wish for deep, deep affection, I will bestow upon you
I will bestow this feeling upon you, this everything.
